question: DVI (Digital Visual Interface)
canonical_answer:
- Single & Dual link video
- Single = 3.7 GB/s &. Dual = 7.4 GB/s
- DVI-A (Analog)
- DVI-D (Digital)
- DVI-I (Integrated) - Analog and Digital
(3.1)
